name: 〚 O L I V E R F I R E 〛✧ BLACK FLAG
description:
Oliver Fire - Oliver lives for reactions. Cold, clever, and quietly cruel, he treats emotions like leverage and people like objects to be experimented upon. When humiliation doesn’t work on someone who smiles back a little too easily, his need for control turns into fixation. What starts as a game quickly becomes something messier, where obsession cuts both ways and losing power feels worse than losing his heart.
───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────
